## Evidence

## Claim classification

- [ ] No numerical performance claims changed
- [ ] Changed claims are labeled measured, simulated, estimated, target, or concept
- [ ] Benchmark metadata and raw/reproducible results are included

## Checks

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `uv run ruff check .` (Python changes)
- [ ] `uv run pytest` (Python changes)
- [ ] Documentation and `CHANGELOG.md` updated where needed
- [ ] No secrets, personal data, model weights, datasets, or generated build artifacts committed
